embeds.title: MORIMENS V2.5 PV
embeds.description:
“O Fate...You are my eternal cage.”
“As your prisoner, I will meet your judgment—”
✦ Arachne VA: Ōnishi Saori
✦ Nefraea VA: Ōnishi Saori

✦ Original Composition: "Lascia ch'io pianga" by G.F. Handel
✦ Arrangement & Adaptation: F.R.K. / B.I.A.V. Studio
✦ Produced by: B.I.A.V. Studio
